name: Ben
goal: Ben wants to find a restaurant that serves delicious food at a reasonable price and has a cozy atmosphere where he can relax and enjoy a great dining experience with his friends tonight.
backstory: Ben has been looking forward to dinner all day and is excited to try a new restaurant. He recently tried a great Italian place and is open to suggestions, but also loves Mexican food. His friends often appreciate his helpful recommendations.

focus_notes.cost: For Ben, cost is a consideration, but not the top priority - he's willing to spend a bit more for a great dining experience.
focus_notes.comfort: Ben prioritizes comfort and ambiance in a restaurant, preferring places with a cozy atmosphere where everyone can relax.
focus_notes.time: As Ben gets hungrier, the time it takes to decide on a restaurant and get seated becomes more important to him, but he's not in a huge rush initially.
focus_notes.safety: Ben assumes that the suggested restaurants will be safe and doesn't prioritize this aspect unless someone raises a concern.
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: Ben is relatively flexible when it comes to the type of cuisine or restaurant style, as long as it's something the group can agree on and enjoy together.
